content: 您好，请稍等，我们还在准备完善第二波志愿者onboarding的文档！
我们会按照公告中所说在3/13之前完成邀请

由于我们的疏忽，前期招募表没有繁体中文选项；
只要您在回复中提及了“繁体中文”或"Traditional Chinese"，选择其他语种我们也都会计入。
再次感谢您的耐心。

Hello Keepers,

We are assigning the Community Interpreter role to eligible candidates and will be sending out an onboarding message soon that guides you to the designated Volunteer Project Server, where you'll find all the files and guidelines you need. Our Volunteer Mods are still finalizing some preparations — please bear with us while we get everything ready. **Onboarding will go out before March 13th.**

In the meantime, we were unable to reach the following candidates via their Discord IDs:

**Amanda Parsons / Rappy / Jhon Gomez / Chara / 朱道 / Krait / Plainteacup / Saoirse Faye / Shiraori / ShinyShadow_ / Haps**

This may be because your Discord ID has changed since you submitted your application, or because you are no longer in the Morimens Official Server. If you provided an email address on your application, we will attempt to reach you there as well.

各位守密人好，

我们正在为符合条件的候选人分配社区译员身份组，并将于近期发送入职引导消息，带领大家前往专属志愿者项目服务器——所需的全部文件与说明均可在那里找到。目前，我们的志愿者版主仍在进行最后的准备工作，请大家耐心等待。**入职引导消息将于3月13日前发出。**

此外，我们未能通过Discord ID联系到以下候选人：

**Amanda Parsons / Rappy / Jhon Gomez / Chara / 朱道 / Krait / Plainteacup / Saoirse Faye / Shiraori / ShinyShadow_ / Haps**

这可能是因为您在提交申请后更改了Discord ID，或者您目前已不在Morimens官方服务器中。如果您在申请时填写了电子邮件地址，我们也将尝试通过邮件与您联系。
